title: Rename CI workflow and avoid full_ci on workflow edits
description: Rename .github/workflows/ci.yml to build_and_test.yml and adjust full_ci path logic so .github/workflows/** changes don't trigger full_ci=true.

title: Remove YOLOZU version display
description: Stop displaying or injecting YOLOZU versions; use versionless PyPI links and remove runtime placeholder logic.

title: Add quiz answer reveal toggles
description: Add two switches to quiz_template_skeleton to control explanation visibility after answering and showing all answers/score; document behavior in manifest.json.

title: Split quiz_template_skeleton into html/css/js
description: Extract inline scripts from education/quiz_template_skeleton.html into education/quiz_template_skeleton.js and add an optional education/quiz_template_skeleton.css; update HTML to reference them.

title: Document quiz explanation authoring rules
description: Add contentAuthoring requirements to manifest.json: follow theme/URLs, include question terms in explanations, explain all options, and provide related topic examples when relevant.
